subject: Re: from Russia with love :))
body:
when are you coming

----- Original Message ----
From: nina . <nina-mel@mail.ru>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Thursday, October 19, 2006 11:05:27 AM
Subject: from Russia with love :))


Hello Jeffrey!
i've stolen your email address from Katia ;)
hope you don't mind that i wrote you?didnt have any news from you for a long time,decided to ask if you you are ok and to remind of myself before you'll completely forget me :)

how are you there?how is everybody-Sarah,Irina,Tatiana?
how is Tatiana's health?-I had her phone number and email address in my cell phone's contacts,but have lost the phone,so can't find her anymore..if you still keep in touch with her,maybe you could ask her to email me how is she.hope she feels well already..

any interesting scientific news?
what do you read now? -still reread the book you gave me-"a man who mistook.."-so interesting and amazing!i told to all my friends in russia about it :) thank you!

Hugs from Nina 
(we can use "Steeve" for conspiracy:)
